name: Locus Workspace
summary: Canvas workspace for organizing Unity assets and scene references inside Locus.

summaryI18n.zh: 在 Locus 中用画布整理 Unity 资源和场景引用。
summaryI18n.en: Canvas workspace for organizing Unity assets and scene references inside Locus.

author: r1n7aro
description: Locus Workspace adds a canvas view for collecting Unity assets and scene references, arranging them across pages, searching project assets, and selecting or inspecting references from Locus.

descriptionI18n.zh: Locus Workspace 提供一个画布视图，用于收集 Unity 资源和场景引用、跨页面整理、搜索项目资源，并从 Locus 中选择或检查引用。
descriptionI18n.en: Locus Workspace adds a canvas view for collecting Unity assets and scene references, arranging them across pages, searching project assets, and selecting or inspecting references from Locus.
